description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named NestedText that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to test across multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-11) and Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9) in parallel. For each job, check out the repository with submodules, set up the specified Python version, install packages with pip, and run tests with tox.
